title: Portuguese-Style Chicken Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful stir fry dish infused with the flavors of Portugal, featuring citrus-marinated chicken and a mix of vibrant vegetables.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together orange juice, lemon zest, and olive oil.
2. Add the chicken to the marinade and mix well to coat.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
4. Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
5. Add garlic and onion to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes.
6. Add the marinated chicken to the skillet and cook for 5-6 minutes per side.
7. Add the bell pepper to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
8. Stir in citrusy stir fry sauce and cook for 1-2 minutes.
9. Serve the chicken and vegetables hot, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
